subject: docs(plan): add implementation plan for intent labels and micro-summaries
body:
Phase A expands intent labels to support multi-word phrases and updates
defaults. Phase B adds three structured summary fields per module
(does/when/consequence) for plain-language reader comprehension.

Tags: documentation, planning, intent, summaries
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: intent-labels-summaries
Semver: patch
